name: Carlos Ward
abstract: Carlos Ward (May 1, 1940 – January 16, 2026) was a Panamanian-born American funk and jazz alto saxophonist and flautist. He is best known as a member of the funk and disco band BT Express as well as a jazz sideman.

concerts.label: Clifford Thornton New Art Ensemble, with Jayne Cortez, Poet, and the Rashied Ali Quintet

about_quotes.speaker: Dave Liebman
about_quotes.evidence: I didn't know that Carlos Ward was in the band. ... In addition to you and him, Alex Foster, Carlos Ward, Bill Evans, Gato Barbieri, John Stubblefield, Dave Valentine, Mike Nock, Jorge Dalto, Lionel Hampton . . .
about_quotes.doc_title: Dave Liebman — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
